item.title: Collapsology: Why your biggest threat isn’t exposed RDP
item.description: In September 2021, I presented a conference talk entitled “Collapsology: Why Exposed RDP Isn’t Your Biggest Threat” where I gave an overview of how to identify cultural threats in a rapidly evolving business landscape, and how we can use modern-day tools to identify these threats before they result in security culture collapse.

item.title: Agloe: What the Map Makers of the 1930s can Teach us About Protecting our Data in 2018
item.description: What does the little town of Agloe, Colchester, NY have in common with modern day data protection? Why when I look for directions to Agloe, Colchester, NY do I only get a partial match?
